summary: Migrate content search from removed /api/content/search-* endpoints to /api/search/fetch-search-page-{screens,flows,apps} with the new searchQuery payload.
reason: Mobbin re-architected content search after the prior print; the old REST endpoints now 404. New body nests filters under searchQuery{type:filters,...}, flattens pageIndex, renames screenKeywords->textInScreenshotQuery and appCategories->categories, and the response is enveloped under value.data. Filter values are display names, not slugs. apps default sortBy is publishedAt.
validated_outcome: Live authed dogfood 141/141: screens/flows/apps search return real results with the new endpoints.
